title: OpenGL Sandbox
description: C++ pixel sandbox with Conway's Game of Life, gravity, heat sims, and WASD player movement. Built from scratch pre-AI in raw OpenGL 3.3 + GLFW + ImGui. Web port via Claude in progress; Windows download below.

title: mutual™
description: Camera hardware that cryptographically signs video at the moment of capture — before any software can touch it. If a single frame is altered, the signature breaks. Proof of authenticity for forensics, insurance, and legal evidence.

title: artefact(s): LeNet-1
description: Browser-based interactive visualization of LeNet-1, the pioneering convolutional neural network. First entry in an in-browser series exploring historical computing artefacts.
